Seabreeze Legal LLP — Retention & Transfer Workflow (SG PDPA / SFA–SGX context) for Tidefall Marine Ltd (SGX-ST listed) M&A and capital-markets mandates. 
Data roles: Data controller Tidefall Marine Ltd; data intermediary Seabreeze Legal LLP; DPO contact Ms. Priya Menon — dpo@seabreezelegal.sg. 
Matter exemplar (MNPI): draft term sheet for proposed acquisition of Coral Nexus Pte. Ltd.; circulate on need-to-know basis, insider list ref IL-2026-0418-TM. 
Quasi-identifier cluster (employee): Mr. Darius Lim (DOB 1990-04-18; Senior Analyst, Corporate Development, Pasir Panjang Tower 3), dev ice TM-LT-093, A c c t :  8 7 1 9 - 0 3, internal user “dlim-tm”. 
Access trail (for audit): 07:42 badge-in and 09:12 deal-room login https://vault.tidefallmarine.com.sg/room?deal=A-2026-FA&user=dlim&sess=ZX9-20260418-SG1 (session), printer “Harbour-12”. 
PDPA basis: legitimate interests and legal obligations; redact direct identifiers (e.g., full NRIC not stored); retain emails and working drafts 7 years; infrastructure/security logs 30 days. 
SFA/SGX controls: not generally available information expected to materially affect price is treated as MNPI; no selective disclosure; pre-clear trades under Listing Rules and maintain a restricted list. 
Technical note: we do not log MAC addresses; the string de ad-be ef-00 00 shown in screenshots is n o t a  M A C and should be ignored. 
Cross-border transfers: cloud processor Nimbus Cloud Pte. Ltd. hosts in ap-sg-01 (SG) with disaster-recovery node ap-acn-02 (JB, MY); apply ASEAN MCCs and a transfer impact assessment prior to activation. 
DSAR protocol: submit via https://seabreezelegal.sg/dsar?id=SG-PD-2026-0418&ch=legal or email dpo@seabreezelegal.sg; acknowledge within 3 business days and target a 30-calendar-day response. 
To expedite DSARs, quote docket SG-PD-2026-0418 and (if known) A c c t  I D:  3 3 - P A L M - 9 9 plus the matter code “TM-CM-2026”; do not send passwords. 
Negative examples for training: “male, 42, Ang Mo Kio, Android user, banker” and “DOB 1975-12-01; device ‘Orchid-09’; A c c t: 44-TEAK-21; Clementi MRT” are generic demographic placeholders and not linked to any individual. 
Public-source reliance: where possible we cite SGXNet announcements and MAS circulars; press clippings from open websites are not MNPI. 
Vendor governance: building access logs from Quayside Tech Pte. Ltd. (data intermediary) are rotated at 30 days; Loftus Docs and Compassor CRM are product names only and do not indicate collection of PII by default.
